mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_transactions(user_id, order_id, trade_id, type, amount, balance_after, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{tradeId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wallet_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalWalletTransactions, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'PAYMENT' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS walletPaymentAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'REGISTRATION_BONUS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS registrationBonusAmount FROM wallet_transactions

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, order_id AS orderId, trade_id AS tradeId, type, amount, balance_after AS balanceAfter, remark, create_time AS createTime FROM wallet_transactions ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
